recommendations.title: Enhance Climate Disclosure and Transition Plans
recommendations.description: Prepare and publish detailed climate-related disclosures aligned with TCFD and CDP frameworks to avoid P/E compression and foreign institutional investor outflows.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids estimated 5-10% P/E compression, preserving market cap value potentially worth ₹500-1000 Cr
recommendations.peer_benchmark: JSW Energy's 15% ESG score uplift and green bond issuance

recommendations.title: Strengthen BRSR and SEBI Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Ensure comprehensive BRSR and SEBI quarterly governance reports are submitted timely and transparently to avoid regulatory scrutiny and trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoids cost of capital increase by 20-40 bps, preserving ₹50-100 Cr in financing costs annually

recommendations.title: Invest ₹2000 Cr in Green Energy Projects
recommendations.description: Match peer JSW Energy by investing ₹2000 Cr in green projects to support the 2030 net-zero target and improve ESG positioning.
recommendations.profitability_link: Expected ROI of 10-20%, generating ₹200-400 Cr in returns over 3 years
recommendations.peer_benchmark: JSW Energy's ₹2000 Cr green bond investment

recommendations.title: Issue Green Bonds to Finance ESG Initiatives
recommendations.description: Raise ₹2000 Cr via green bonds at a 50bps discount to finance sustainability projects, reducing cost of capital and attracting ESG-focused investors.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reduces cost of capital by 20-40 bps, saving ₹40-80 Cr annually on debt servicing
recommendations.peer_benchmark: JSW Energy's green bond issuance at 50bps discount
